column1: Ernie Clement stands out as the top pick for a hit, riding a strong recent stretch and holding a clear platoon advantage against Patrick Sandoval. Clement has recorded a hit in 74% of games and benefits from a hitter-friendly park, making him a steady, high-floor option. Ketel Marte also offers reliability from the leadoff spot with a favorable matchup, though his recent contact rate is less impressive. George Springer and Yandy Diaz are viable alternatives but carry slightly less consistency.
